PowerShell(Get-ChildItem "c:\\Users\\citru\\OneDrive\\Documents\\GitHub\\Anshu Patel Portfolio\\media\\Silent Spellcraft" | Select-Object Name, @{N='MB';E={[math]::Round\($_.Length/1MB,2\)}} | Sort-Object MB -Descending)

PowerShell($git = \(Get-Command git.exe -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\).Source; if \(-not $git\) { $common = @\("C:\\Program Files\\Git\\bin\\git.exe","C:\\Program Files \(x86\)\\Git\\bin\\git.exe"\); foreach\($p in $common\){if\(Test-Path $p\){$git=$p;break}}}; if \($git\) { & $git -C "c:\\Users\\citru\\OneDrive\\Documents\\GitHub\\Anshu Patel Portfolio" ls-files "media/Silent Spellcraft/" } else { "git not found" })
